jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Firstcry
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!
